历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 17549 → 19244 → 18878 → 21515 → 18050, showing significant fluctuations over the past 5 years with an overall backward trend; the baseline for 2025 is about 18050, a notable forward shift of about 3465 compared to 2024, indicating a recovery rebound; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan was 73 in 2021–2022, 71 in 2023, and increased to 85 in 2024–2025; the 2026 plan is 92, an expansion of about 8.2% compared to 2025, with increased enrollment slots slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 75th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 63–75 range in recent years, belonging to mid-to-upper level science and engineering institutions; no significant negative or positive signals in 2026 reputation data; the university's Douyin popularity total ranking did not enter the top 100, with average attention; no historical record of admission cutoff breaks, indicating relatively stable application psychology; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data lacks entries for this university; the university is characterized by geology, resources, and environment, with strong related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended in society; the university offers related majors, which are attractive to candidates; the number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan in 2026 is about 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) compared to 2025, with the expanded candidate pool intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, not a local university in Hunan; its enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5%–3.0%, belonging to a medium-scale enrollment from other provinces, with no special regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant fluctuations in historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 8.2%, and the double pressure of an 8.4% increase in local Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 18050; the predicted minimum ranking is about 19142, with a range of 18642–19642.
